description: Jomhouri-ye Eslami (جمهوری اسلامی) was founded on 30 May 1979 as the organ of the [Islamic Republican Party](/orgs/islamic-republican-party). Managing director: [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei). First editor-in-chief: [Mir-Hossein Mousavi](/people/mir-hossein-mousavi). The paper continued after the IRP's dissolution in 1987 and is classified as close to [Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani)'s circle by the 2010s.
